The `ElementType` encoding carries bending-radius data (e.g., `…_8_80_40_40` — the "8" denotes the radius multiplier × diameter = 1280 mm bend radius; the "80_40_40" encodes leg lengths).

### 3. Related Junction Fittings (same DN 160 branch)

The model also contains **collar saddle fittings** (type TPR0160, PredefinedType = JUNCTION, 2 instances) described as "Collar Saddle in Circular Duct 90°, Circular d 160 mm". These are 90° saddle branch connections with a 160 mm branch diameter branching off 315 mm or 250 mm main ducts. While not technically "flexible duct," they match the DN 160 branch size of the flexible system and are coded with `ApplicableOccurrence = 'Circ'` (circular cross-section).
